promptDef.name: search-models-used-in-components-and-ui-states
promptDef.prompt:
Find model declarations that are used by both Angular components and UI states.

Output it in this format:

Model - filePath

summary.prompt:
Find model declarations that are used by both Angular components and UI states.

Output it in this format:

Model - filePath

input.cypher:
MATCH (model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration|ClassDeclaration)
MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (comp)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(model)
RETURN DISTINCT model.id, model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration|ClassDeclaration)
MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (comp)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(model)
RETURN DISTINCT model.id, model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member)
MATCH (member)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION|HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath, comp.name

MATCH (model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (member)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath, comp.name AS componentName

MATCH (model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (member)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath, state.name AS stateName

MATCH (model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE state.name CONTAINS 'State'
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (member)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath, state.name AS stateName

MATCH (model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration {name: 'ViewingPreferences'})
MATCH (anyClass:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (member)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
RETURN DISTINCT anyClass.name, anyClass.filePath

MATCH (model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
MATCH (anyClass:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (member)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
MATCH (anyClass)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(decorator:Identifier)
RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath, anyClass.name, decorator.text AS decoratorType

MATCH (model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)
MATCH (d1)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member1:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (member1)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
MATCH (service:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d2:Decorator)
MATCH (d2)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(serviceId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (service)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member2:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (member2)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION|HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)
MATCH (d1)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member1)
MATCH (member1)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION|HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
MATCH (service:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d2:Decorator)
MATCH (d2)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(serviceId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (service)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member2)
MATCH (member2)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION|HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)
MATCH (d1)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member1:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)
MATCH (member1)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION|HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
MATCH (service:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d2:Decorator)
MATCH (d2)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(serviceId:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'})
MATCH (service)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member2:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)
MATCH (member2)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION|HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)
MATCH (d1)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member1:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)
MATCH (member1)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION|HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
MATCH (state:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE state.name CONTAINS 'State' OR state.name CONTAINS 'Store'
MATCH (state)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member2:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)
MATCH (member2)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION|HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath

MATCH (model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)
MATCH (d1)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member1:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)
MATCH (member1)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION|HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
MATCH (stateOrService:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE (stateOrService)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'}) 
   OR stateOrService.name CONTAINS 'State'
   OR stateOrService.name CONTAINS 'Store'
MATCH (stateOrService)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member2:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)
MATCH (member2)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION|HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath
ORDER BY model.name

MATCH (model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d1:Decorator)
MATCH (d1)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member1:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)
MATCH (member1)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION|HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
MATCH (stateOrService:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE (stateOrService)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(:Identifier {text: 'Injectable'}) 
   OR stateOrService.name CONTAINS 'State'
   OR stateOrService.name CONTAINS 'Store'
MATCH (stateOrService)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(member2:PropertyDeclaration|MethodDeclaration)
MATCH (member2)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION|HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model)
RETURN DISTINCT model.name, model.filePath
